mapper.select:
SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.description, COUNT(p.part_id) AS part_count, c.updated_at FROM tb_part_category c LEFT JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = c.company_id AND p.category_id = c.category_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name, c.description, c.updated_at ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC, c.category_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT category_id, company_id, category_name, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_part_category WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.description, COUNT(p.part_id) AS part_count, c.updated_at FROM tb_part_category c LEFT JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = c.company_id AND p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.company_id = #{companyId} AND c.category_id = #{categoryId} GROUP BY c.category_id, c.category_name, c.description, c.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_part_category ( company_id, category_name, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_part_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND category_id = #{categoryId}
